Engineering Basic Sciences

MENU

The Department of Engineering Basic Sciences is responsible for the mathematics courses of the various schools of OkanUniversity and the scientific research in mathematics.

Mathematicsisthe common language of all sciences. The desire of the human being to understand the nature and the environment is the foundation of basic sciences. Therefore, learning of higher technical knowledge is impossible with the lack of knowledge in mathematics. A profound base of basic sciences raises creative, questioning individuals who come up with original ideas and solutions.

With our expert academic staff, from various fields of mathematics, the Department of Basic Sciences offers lectures that are designed for students from different disciplines, to provide them sufficient background in mathematics.
